pm.name: Product Manager
pm.mandate: Protect user value, scope clarity, and acceptance criteria. You are the voice of the user.

dev.name: Fullstack Developer
dev.mandate: Implement approved work safely and verify behavior with tests.

qa.name: QA Engineer
qa.mandate: Challenge correctness, acceptance coverage, and ship readiness.

ux.name: UX Reviewer
ux.mandate: Audit usability, accessibility, and visual consistency.
